summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Dimension Lock: Deathly Stories post-overhaul. Validated all 10 review items: app boots directly to main menu (no IntroCinematic, file deleted), new title artwork renders at all viewports, all menu buttons (enter-endless / controls / lore) functional, gameplay works (score rose 0->384), HUD/mobile controls properly scaled at 390x844 and 360x640, no console errors anywhere, new enemy types and renderer methods exist, interactive backgrounds (floating crystals, chains) render in-game, all required data-testids preserved, sound engine methods exist (verified in source). 0 console errors during a 30s gameplay session.

issues: Accepted: There is a noticeable dark empty band between the game canvas (which ends around y=540) and the on-screen control pad at the bottom. Per agent-to-agent note this is an accepted layout choice for portrait but could be polished in a future pass by either increasing canvas display height or moving controls upward.

critical_code_review_comments: MainMenu.jsx is 730+ lines - consider splitting BgCanvas, TitleArt, and tab panels into separate files for maintainability.

HUD scale transform is applied via inline style on the HUD container; tested elements report transform:none on the bar's parent. Scaling appears to work visually but may be applied to game-hud root element only. Confirm via design review that intended scale is reaching all desired children.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend overhaul fully verified. IntroCinematic.jsx is deleted. App boots straight to main menu. New title art image renders. Five new enemy classes (PlagueImp, ShadowCrawler, EmberWraith, BoneHowler, HexBeast) exist with corresponding renderer draw methods and engine spawnEnemy support. New sound methods (playHitHeavy, playLand, playBlocked, playEnemyDeath, playProjectileFire, playEnemyCharge, playSummon, playUiClick) exist on soundEngine. SPRITE_SIZE bumped to 170. renderer.pulseNearestCrystal API present. Combat verified: score 0->384 with no errors. Mobile responsiveness validated at both 360x640 and 390x844 - title art fits, buttons stacked vertically, character art appears below buttons, HUD bars do not bleed offscreen. Pause works. No console errors at any viewport.
